title: Stats Avançados: River Actions, Probe, Open Shove, Won Flop, XF OOP e mais
plan: Add health badge ranges for all 11 new stats in config/targets.yaml (open_shove, rbw, bet_river, call_river, probe_bet, fold_to_probe, bet_vs_missed_cbet, xf_oop, won_saw_flop, plus verify w$sd and hands_count)
Implement new preflop stats in CashAnalyzer (Open Shove %, Raise by Walk) - extend _analyze_preflop_hand() and get_preflop_stats()
Implement new river stats in CashAnalyzer (Bet River %, Call River %) - extend _analyze_postflop_hand() and get_postflop_stats()
Implement new postflop advanced stats in CashAnalyzer (Probe Bet %, Fold to Probe %, Bet vs Missed CBet %, XF OOP %) - extend _analyze_postflop_hand()
Implement win rate stats in CashAnalyzer (Won Saw Flop %) and verify W$SD integration
Mirror all new stat calculations in TournamentAnalyzer
Update analytics_pipeline.py to persist all new stats to analytics.db
Update web/data.py to load and prepare new stats for overview and stats pages
Update overview.html templates (cash + tournament) to display new stat columns in HUD table
Update stats.html templates (cash + tournament) to show new stats with positional breakdown where applicable
Write unit tests for each new stat (preflop: test_stats.py, postflop: test_postflop.py, win rates: new or existing test file)
Run full quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build) and fix any issues
